EmotionHistoryEntry.title: EmotionHistoryEntry
EmotionHistoryEntry.description: A record of a user's emotion at a specific time.

userId.description: The UID of the user who recorded the emotion.

emotionKey.description: The key representing the selected emotion.

timestamp.description: The time the emotion was recorded (Unix timestamp in milliseconds).

UserOil.title: UserOil
UserOil.description: A record of an essential oil added to a user's medicine cabinet.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns the oil.

oilId.description: The ID of the oil from the catalog.

addedAt.description: The time the oil was added (Unix timestamp in milliseconds).

Admin.title: Admin
Admin.description: A user who is an administrator.

grantedAt.description: The time the admin role was granted (Unix timestamp in milliseconds).

Order.title: Order
Order.description: A user's order for essential oils.

userId.description: The UID of the user who placed the order.

status.description: Order status: pending, processing, shipped, delivered, cancelled.

createdAt.description: The time the order was created.

/admins/{docId}.description: Collection storing admin users. The docId is the UID.

/oils/{docId}.description: Collection storing oil catalog items. Doc ID is the oil ID.

/emotionHistory/{docId}.description: Collection storing all user emotion history records.

/userOils/{docId}.description: Collection storing user's medicine cabinet (inventory of oils).
